text.tspan: Death rate from particular matter air pollution vs PM2.5 concentration
Age-standardized death rate from particular matter (PM2.5) exposure per 100,000 people versus the average mean
annual exposure to particulate matter smaller than 2.5 microns (PM2.5), measured in micrograms per cubic meter.
PM2.5 air pollution, mean annual exposure
Death rate from particulate matter air pollution
Source: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation, Brauer et al. (2017) via World Bank
